prophecies.a: 在「美丽新世界」中，人类不再通过自然生育繁衍，而是在实验室的瓶子里通过体外受精培育，从受精卵到胚胎发育全程在人工环境中完成。
prophecies.q_en: In vitro fertilization and test-tube babies
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World, humans are no longer born through natural reproduction but are cultivated in laboratory bottles via in vitro fertilization, with the entire process from fertilized egg to embryo development completed in an artificial environment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1978年7月25日，世界首例试管婴儿路易丝·布朗在英国诞生。截至2024年，全球已有超过1200万试管婴儿出生。IVF技术已成为常规医疗手段。
prophecies.verdict_en: On July 25, 1978, the world's first IVF baby Louise Brown was born in England. As of 2024, over 12 million IVF babies have been born worldwide. IVF has become a routine medical procedure.

prophecies.a: 小说中通过「波坎诺夫斯基程序」对受精卵进行基因操控，预先设定人类的智力、体格和外貌，按照社会需求批量生产不同等级的人类。
prophecies.a_en: The novel's 'Bokanovsky's Process' involves genetic manipulation of fertilized eggs to predetermine human intelligence, physique, and appearance, mass-producing different grades of humans according to social needs.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2012年CRISPR基因编辑技术问世。2018年11月，中国科学家贺建奎宣布使用CRISPR编辑人类胚胎基因，创造了世界首例基因编辑婴儿，引发全球伦理争议。胚胎基因筛选（PGD/PGS）已在辅助生殖中广泛应用。
prophecies.verdict_en: CRISPR gene-editing technology was invented in 2012. In November 2018, Chinese scientist He Jiankui announced the creation of the world's first gene-edited babies using CRISPR, sparking global ethical debate. Embryo genetic screening (PGD/PGS) is already widely used in assisted reproduction.

prophecies.q: 情绪药物「索玛」与抗抑郁药
prophecies.a: 小说中政府向全体公民免费发放名为「索玛」的药物——服用后立即感到幸福和满足，没有副作用，用以消除一切不快情绪和社会不满。
prophecies.a_en: In the novel, the government freely distributes a drug called 'soma' to all citizens — it instantly produces feelings of happiness and contentment with no side effects, eliminating all unhappiness and social discontent.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1987年百忧解（Prozac）上市，开启SSRI类抗抑郁药时代。截至2024年，美国约13%的成年人服用抗抑郁药物（CDC数据）。全球抗抑郁药市场规模超过150亿美元。虽非强制性的「索玛」，但情绪药物的大规模使用与赫胥黎的描述高度相似。
prophecies.verdict_en: Prozac launched in 1987, beginning the SSRI antidepressant era. As of 2024, approximately 13% of US adults take antidepressants (CDC data). The global antidepressant market exceeds $15 billion. While not the mandatory 'soma,' the mass use of mood-altering drugs closely mirrors Huxley's description.

prophecies.a: 在「美丽新世界」中，亨利·福特被尊为神明（「我们的福特」），消费和丢弃成为最高美德，公民被教导「越旧越差，修补不如新买」，消费主义成为社会的精神支柱。
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World, Henry Ford is revered as a deity ('Our Ford'), consumption and disposal are the highest virtues, citizens are taught 'ending is better than mending,' and consumerism becomes society's spiritual foundation.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 计划性淘汰和快时尚已成为全球现象。苹果公司因故意降低旧iPhone速度被罚款（2020年法国罚款2500万欧元）。全球电子垃圾年产量超过5000万吨（联合国2024年报告）。购物节（双十一、黑色星期五）成为准宗教仪式。
prophecies.verdict_en: Planned obsolescence and fast fashion are global phenomena. Apple was fined for deliberately slowing older iPhones (€25 million fine in France, 2020). Global e-waste exceeds 50 million tonnes annually (UN 2024 report). Shopping festivals (Singles' Day, Black Friday) have become quasi-religious rituals.

prophecies.a: 小说中的「感官电影」（Feelies）提供全方位感官刺激，观众可以触摸、闻到、感受屏幕上的一切。人们沉浸在无尽的娱乐中，不再思考、不再阅读、不再追问意义。
prophecies.q_en: Amusing ourselves to death: the Feelies
prophecies.a_en: The novel's 'Feelies' provide full sensory stimulation — audiences can touch, smell, and feel everything on screen. People immerse themselves in endless entertainment, ceasing to think, read, or question meaning.
prophecies.verdict_zh: VR/AR技术已实现沉浸式体验（Meta Quest、Apple Vision Pro）。美国成年人日均屏幕时间超过7小时（2024年数据）。TikTok等短视频平台的算法推荐创造了无限内容流。尼尔·波兹曼在《娱乐至死》(1985)中引用赫胥黎观点，认为「赫胥黎的预言比奥威尔更准确」。
prophecies.verdict_en: VR/AR technology has achieved immersive experiences (Meta Quest, Apple Vision Pro). US adults average over 7 hours of daily screen time (2024 data). TikTok's algorithmic feed creates infinite content streams. Neil Postman cited Huxley in Amusing Ourselves to Death (1985), arguing 'Huxley's prophecy was more accurate than Orwell's.'

prophecies.q: 社会等级的生物学预设
prophecies.a: 小说将人类分为阿尔法（Alpha）、贝塔（Beta）、伽马（Gamma）、德尔塔（Delta）和伊普西龙（Epsilon）五个等级，通过胚胎阶段的化学处理预先决定每个人的智力和社会角色。
prophecies.a_en: The novel divides humans into five castes — Alpha, Beta, Gamma, Delta, and Epsilon — with intelligence and social roles predetermined through chemical treatment during the embryonic stage.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然没有法律上的等级制度，但基因检测和胚胎筛选技术（PGD）已允许父母选择胚胎特征。富裕家庭可获得更优质的基因筛选服务，形成事实上的「基因阶层」。2019年发表在《Nature Genetics》上的研究显示，多基因评分（PRS）已被用于胚胎选择。但生物学预设等级制度尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: While no legal caste system exists, genetic testing and embryo screening (PGD) allow parents to select embryo traits. Wealthy families access superior genetic screening, creating a de facto 'genetic class.' A 2019 Nature Genetics study showed polygenic risk scores (PRS) are being used for embryo selection. However, biologically predetermined castes have not been realized.

prophecies.a: 小说中使用「睡眠教学法」（Hypnopaedia），在人们睡眠时通过耳边反复播放信息来灌输道德观念和社会规范，完成对个体的意识形态塑造。
prophecies.a_en: The novel uses 'Hypnopaedia' (sleep teaching), repeatedly playing messages into people's ears during sleep to instill moral values and social norms, completing ideological conditioning of individuals.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2012年以色列魏茨曼科学研究所证实睡眠中可以形成新的嗅觉条件反射。2015年西北大学研究表明睡眠中播放声音可以强化白天学到的记忆。但用于意识形态灌输的大规模睡眠教学尚未实现。算法推荐和信息茧房被认为是清醒状态下的「Hypnopaedia」。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2012, Israel's Weizmann Institute confirmed new olfactory conditioning can form during sleep. A 2015 Northwestern University study showed sounds played during sleep can reinforce daytime memories. However, large-scale sleep teaching for ideological conditioning remains unrealized. Algorithmic feeds and filter bubbles are considered the waking equivalent of Hypnopaedia.

prophecies.q: 性的自由化与去神圣化
prophecies.a: 在「美丽新世界」中，性行为被完全去私密化和去神圣化，鼓励多伴侣、反对一对一的长期关系，儿童从小接受性教育和性游戏，一夫一妻制被视为变态行为。
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World, sex is completely deprivatized and desacralized. Multiple partners are encouraged, monogamy is considered deviant, and children receive sexual education and engage in erotic play from an early age.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 约会应用（Tinder于2012年推出）使随意性行为更加常规化。全球多个国家推行全面性教育。开放式关系和多元恋（polyamory）获得更多社会接受度。但一夫一妻制仍是主流社会规范，性的完全「去神圣化」未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Dating apps (Tinder launched 2012) have normalized casual sex. Comprehensive sex education is implemented in many countries. Open relationships and polyamory have gained broader social acceptance. However, monogamy remains the dominant social norm, and complete 'desacralization' of sex has not occurred.

prophecies.a: 小说中对婴儿进行巴甫洛夫式条件反射训练——例如让伊普西龙级婴儿接触花朵和书籍时受到电击，使他们终生厌恶自然和阅读，从而安心从事简单劳动。
prophecies.a_en: The novel subjects infants to Pavlovian conditioning — for example, Epsilon-class babies receive electric shocks when touching flowers and books, creating lifelong aversion to nature and reading, ensuring contentment with menial labor.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 行为心理学的商业应用已非常普遍：社交媒体利用可变奖赏机制（点赞、通知）形成用户习惯（《上瘾》，Nir Eyal，2014）。游戏化设计广泛应用于教育和工作场景。但系统性的电击式婴儿训练未成为现实。算法驱动的注意力操控被批评为数字时代的条件反射训练。
prophecies.verdict_en: Commercial applications of behavioral psychology are pervasive: social media uses variable reward mechanisms (likes, notifications) to form user habits (Hooked, Nir Eyal, 2014). Gamification is widely applied in education and workplace settings. Systematic infant shock training has not materialized. Algorithm-driven attention manipulation is criticized as digital-age conditioning.

prophecies.a: 小说中地球由一个「世界国」统治，设有十位「世界控制者」管理全球十大区域，民族国家已不复存在，所有人类被统一管理。
prophecies.q_en: World government and dissolution of sovereignty
prophecies.a_en: The novel's Earth is ruled by a 'World State' with ten 'World Controllers' governing ten global regions. Nation-states no longer exist, and all humanity is uniformly managed.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然全球化组织（联合国、WTO、WHO）的影响力在扩大，但民族国家依然是世界政治的基本单元。2016年英国脱欧、民族主义在全球范围内的回潮，表明主权消融的趋势已经逆转。世界政府在可预见的未来不太可能实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: While global organizations (UN, WTO, WHO) have expanded influence, nation-states remain the fundamental unit of world politics. Brexit in 2016 and the global resurgence of nationalism indicate the trend toward sovereignty dissolution has reversed. A world government remains unlikely in the foreseeable future.

prophecies.a: 在「美丽新世界」中，70%的女性是「自由马丁」——经过处理的不育女性。政府通过马尔萨斯带（避孕装置）严格控制人口，自然生育被视为原始和可耻的行为。
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World, 70% of women are 'freemartins' — sterilized through processing. The government strictly controls population through 'Malthusian belts' (contraceptive devices), and natural reproduction is considered primitive and shameful.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代避孕技术（口服避孕药1960年上市、宫内节育器、皮下埋植等）使生殖控制成为现实。全球约60%的育龄女性使用某种形式的避孕手段（WHO 2023年数据）。中国独生子女政策（1980-2015）是国家级生殖控制的典型案例。但强制绝育和将自然生育视为耻辱的极端形式未普遍出现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Modern contraception (the pill launched 1960, IUDs, implants) has made reproductive control reality. About 60% of women of reproductive age globally use some form of contraception (WHO 2023). China's one-child policy (1980-2015) was a textbook case of state-level reproductive control. However, the extreme forms of forced sterilization and shaming natural birth have not broadly materialized.

prophecies.q: 历史和文化的系统性删除
prophecies.a: 「美丽新世界」中，莎士比亚、《圣经》等传统文学和宗教经典被禁止，博物馆被关闭，历史被系统性地删除。穆斯塔法·蒙德说：「历史是废话。」
prophecies.q_en: Systematic erasure of history and culture
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World, Shakespeare, the Bible, and other classical literature and religious texts are banned, museums are closed, and history is systematically erased. Mustapha Mond says: 'History is bunk.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽非系统性删除，但文化素养在数字时代明显下降。美国国家艺术基金会2019年报告显示，18-24岁年龄段的文学阅读率仅为40%。TikTok和短视频文化削弱了深度阅读习惯。多国出现课程改革争议，部分历史和文学作品被从教学大纲中移除。但有组织的文化禁毁未在民主国家大规模出现。
prophecies.verdict_en: While not systematically erased, cultural literacy has declined in the digital age. A 2019 NEA report showed literary reading rates among 18-24 year-olds at only 40%. TikTok and short-video culture have undermined deep reading habits. Curriculum reform controversies in many countries have removed certain historical and literary works from syllabi. However, organized cultural suppression has not occurred at scale in democracies.

prophecies.a: 在小说中，公民被条件反射训练为厌恶节俭和修补旧物，被灌输「越多越好」的理念。经济体系围绕持续消费和丢弃运转，停止消费被视为反社会行为。
prophecies.a_en: In the novel, citizens are conditioned to despise frugality and mending old things, indoctrinated with the idea that 'more is better.' The economic system revolves around continuous consumption and disposal; ceasing to consume is considered antisocial.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 计划性淘汰已成为商业标准——打印机墨盒芯片限制使用次数、智能手机电池不可更换、软件更新使旧设备变慢。欧盟2024年通过「维修权」法规，正是对这一趋势的回应。全球消费者债务创历史新高，分期付款和「先买后付」服务（Klarna、Afterpay）进一步推动超前消费。
prophecies.verdict_en: Planned obsolescence is now industry standard — printer cartridge chips limit uses, smartphone batteries are non-replaceable, software updates slow older devices. The EU's 2024 'right to repair' legislation directly responds to this trend. Global consumer debt is at historic highs, and 'buy now, pay later' services (Klarna, Afterpay) further drive overconsumption.

prophecies.a: 赫胥黎在《重返美丽新世界》中警告：「通过掌握无线电、电视和即将出现的电子媒体等技术，未来的独裁者将发现，对大众的操控远比粗暴的武力更加高效。」
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World Revisited, Huxley warned: 'By means of ever more effective methods of mind-manipulation, the democracies will change their nature. The quaint old forms will remain, but the underlying substance will be a new kind of totalitarianism.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: Cambridge Analytica丑闻（2018年）揭示了社交媒体数据被用于精准政治操控。算法推荐系统创造信息茧房和回音室效应。2024年全球大选年中，AI生成的虚假信息（deepfake）成为严重的民主威胁。赫胥黎关于技术被用于「比武力更高效的操控」的警告已充分应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Cambridge Analytica scandal (2018) revealed social media data being used for precision political manipulation. Algorithmic recommendation systems create filter bubbles and echo chambers. During the 2024 global election year, AI-generated disinformation (deepfakes) became a serious democratic threat. Huxley's warning about technology enabling 'more effective manipulation than force' has been thoroughly validated.

prophecies.q: 过度娱乐导致公民冷漠
prophecies.a: 赫胥黎在《重返美丽新世界》中指出，奥威尔担心的是审查和禁书，而他担心的是人们根本不再想读书——不是因为被禁止，而是因为被无穷无尽的娱乐所淹没，自愿放弃了思考的能力。
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World Revisited, Huxley noted that while Orwell feared censorship and book-banning, his own fear was that people would simply stop wanting to read — not because books were banned, but because they would be drowned in endless entertainment and voluntarily surrender their capacity for thought.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国皮尤研究中心2023年报告显示，约23%的美国成年人全年未阅读一本书。社交媒体平均注意力时长已缩短至8秒（微软2023年研究）。全球投票率在多数民主国家呈下降趋势。赫胥黎的洞察——人类不是被压迫剥夺自由，而是被快乐消解抵抗——已成为媒体批评的经典论述。
prophecies.verdict_en: A 2023 Pew Research Center report found about 23% of US adults read zero books in a year. Average social media attention spans have shrunk to 8 seconds (Microsoft 2023 study). Voter turnout has declined in most democracies globally. Huxley's insight — that humanity would be undone not by oppression but by pleasure — has become a canonical argument in media criticism.

prophecies.q: 化学物质操控情绪与行为
prophecies.a: 在《重返美丽新世界》中，赫胥黎预测药理学将发展出能精确操控人类情绪、注意力和行为的化学物质，比警棍和监狱更适合用于社会控制。
prophecies.q_en: Chemical control of mood and behavior
prophecies.a_en: In Brave New World Revisited, Huxley predicted pharmacology would develop chemicals that precisely manipulate human mood, attention, and behavior — more suitable for social control than truncheons and prisons.
prophecies.verdict_zh: ADHD药物（利他林/阿得拉）在全球范围内被广泛用于控制儿童行为——美国约10%的学龄儿童被诊断为ADHD并接受药物治疗（CDC 2024年数据）。苯二氮卓类药物（如阿普唑仑）和SSRI类药物年处方量达数亿张。微量给药（microdosing）迷幻药在硅谷成为生产力工具。化学物质操控情绪和行为已是日常现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: ADHD medications (Ritalin/Adderall) are widely used globally to control children's behavior — about 10% of US school-age children are diagnosed with ADHD and medicated (CDC 2024). Benzodiazepines and SSRIs account for hundreds of millions of annual prescriptions. Microdosing psychedelics has become a Silicon Valley productivity tool. Chemical manipulation of mood and behavior is now everyday reality.
